label: Weapon trait
description: Defines a generated or persona weapon trait that modifies weapon stats, damage, appearance, abilities, bonded effects, or wielder effects.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# WeaponTraitWorker subclass that implements this trait's runtime behavior.

weaponCategory.label: Weapon category
weaponCategory.description: WeaponCategoryDef that groups this trait with other traits of the same category.

exclusionTags.label: Exclusion tags
exclusionTags.description: String tags that prevent two traits sharing any tag from appearing on the same weapon.

commonality.label: Commonality
commonality.description: Relative weight for trait selection when generating weapon traits. Higher values make this trait more common.

canGenerateAlone.label: Can generate alone
canGenerateAlone.description: If false, this trait can only appear on a weapon that already has at least one other trait.

damageDefOverride.label: Damage def override
damageDefOverride.description: DamageDef that replaces the weapon's normal damage type when this trait is present.

extraDamages.label: Extra damages
extraDamages.description: Additional damage instances applied alongside the primary damage of each hit.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied to the weapon when this trait is present. Keys are StatDef names; values are float offsets.

statFactors.label: Stat factors
statFactors.description: Stat multipliers applied to the weapon when this trait is present. Keys are StatDef names; values are float factors.

equippedStatOffsets.label: Equipped stat offsets
equippedStatOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied to the wielder while this weapon is equipped. Keys are StatDef names; values are float offsets.

marketValueOffset.label: Market value offset
marketValueOffset.description: Flat silver value added to the weapon's market value when this trait is present.

burstShotSpeedMultiplier.label: Burst shot speed multiplier
burstShotSpeedMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the weapon's burst shot speed (time between shots in a burst).

burstShotCountMultiplier.label: Burst shot count multiplier
burstShotCountMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the weapon's number of shots per burst.

additionalStoppingPower.label: Additional stopping power
additionalStoppingPower.description: Flat stopping power added to the weapon. Stopping power staggers targets on hit.

ignoresAccuracyMaluses.label: Ignores accuracy maluses
ignoresAccuracyMaluses.description: If true, this weapon ignores accuracy penalties from range and other sources.

forcedColor.label: Forced color
forcedColor.description: ColorDef that overrides the weapon's graphic color when this trait is present.

traitAdjectives.label: Trait adjectives
traitAdjectives.description: Localized adjective strings used to compose the weapon's generated name.

equippedHediffs.label: Equipped hediffs
equippedHediffs.description: HediffDefs applied to the wielder while this weapon is equipped.

bondedHediffs.label: Bonded hediffs
bondedHediffs.description: HediffDefs applied to the pawn when this weapon becomes bonded to them.

bondedThought.label: Bonded thought
bondedThought.description: ThoughtDef given to the bonded pawn periodically while carrying the weapon.

killThought.label: Kill thought
killThought.description: ThoughtDef given to the bonded pawn each time they kill with this weapon.

neverBond.label: Never bond
neverBond.description: If true, weapons with this trait can never form a bond with a pawn.

abilityProps.label: Ability props
abilityProps.description: Comp properties that give the weapon a reloadable equippable ability. Applied as a weapon trait ability rather than a ThingDef comp.

basic-weapon-trait.label: Basic weapon trait
basic-weapon-trait.description: A weapon trait with a label and commonality.

stat-offset-trait.label: Stat offset trait
stat-offset-trait.description: A weapon trait that applies flat stat offsets to the weapon.

ability-trait.label: Ability trait
ability-trait.description: A weapon trait that grants the wielder a reloadable ability.
